info.name: Hariyali Malai Paneer & Upwas Aloo Pattice Bhoj Navratri Thali
info.description: No Onion, No Garlic, Sendha Namak - A flavour-packed Upvas thali featuring aromatic Hariyali malai paneer, hearty Sabudana Khichdi, and golden-crisp Upwas Aloo Pattice. Balanced with cooling curd and a touch of sweet-tangy imli chutney for a truly satisfying fasting meal.  (Energy: 1551KCal, Carbohydrates: 214gm, Proteins: 33gm, Fats: 62gm, Sodium: 1797mg)

info.name: Hariyali Malai Paneer
info.description: Creamy paneer tossed in a vibrant hariyali chutney-style gravy for a fresh, indulgent bite. A wholesome meal crafted for your Upvas days.
